main.description: Public scheduling profile for a Schedj user. Calendar credentials and private booking data are never stored in this record.

displayName.description: Name shown on the actor's public scheduling page.

description.description: Short public introduction or scheduling guidance.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone name used to evaluate the actor's local availability rules.

bookingEnabled.description: Whether the actor is currently accepting public bookings.

createdAt.description: Time at which this profile record was created.
